## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard new team members and review the current hiring process and tools.](https://fathom.video/share/aEgCjckQ6zWaEVumzVcb5FMXoxRyUYny?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is exploring a new office space for events and coworking](https://fathom.video/share/aEgCjckQ6zWaEVumzVcb5FMXoxRyUYny?tab=summary&timestamp=27.0)
  - [Current hiring process uses AirOps, Workable, and custom AI tools for candidate evaluation](https://fathom.video/share/aEgCjckQ6zWaEVumzVcb5FMXoxRyUYny?tab=summary&timestamp=106.0)
  - [High volume of applications (100s-1000s) for some roles necessitates automation](https://fathom.video/share/aEgCjckQ6zWaEVumzVcb5FMXoxRyUYny?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Team is open to adjusting or replacing current tools (e.g., considering Greenhouse ATS)](https://fathom.video/share/aEgCjckQ6zWaEVumzVcb5FMXoxRyUYny?tab=summary&timestamp=214.0)

## Topics

### New Office Space

  - [Planning for a two-floor setup:](https://fathom.video/share/aEgCjckQ6zWaEVumzVcb5FMXoxRyUYny?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
      - [First floor: Event space for meetups and partner companies](https://fathom.video/share/aEgCjckQ6zWaEVumzVcb5FMXoxRyUYny?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
      - [Second floor: 10-15 desks for local team members and temporary collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/aEgCjckQ6zWaEVumzVcb5FMXoxRyUYny?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

### Onboarding Progress

  - [Marília: Day 3, still getting up to speed](https://fathom.video/share/aEgCjckQ6zWaEVumzVcb5FMXoxRyUYny?tab=summary&timestamp=51.0)
  - [Tucker: Part-time until April 7th, focusing on understanding the business](https://fathom.video/share/aEgCjckQ6zWaEVumzVcb5FMXoxRyUYny?tab=summary&timestamp=67.0)

### Current Hiring Process Overview

  - [Uses AirOps for job description generation and workflow management](https://fathom.video/share/aEgCjckQ6zWaEVumzVcb5FMXoxRyUYny?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
  - [Workable as the main ATS (Applicant Tracking System)](https://fathom.video/share/aEgCjckQ6zWaEVumzVcb5FMXoxRyUYny?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)
  - [Custom AI tools for resume analysis and application question evaluation](https://fathom.video/share/aEgCjckQ6zWaEVumzVcb5FMXoxRyUYny?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)
  - [Pyroflix for video interviews (chosen for transcript API capabilities)](https://fathom.video/share/aEgCjckQ6zWaEVumzVcb5FMXoxRyUYny?tab=summary&timestamp=1211.0)

### Automation and AI Integration

  - [AI-powered ranking system for initial candidate screening](https://fathom.video/share/aEgCjckQ6zWaEVumzVcb5FMXoxRyUYny?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
  - [Customizable prompts and evaluation criteria](https://fathom.video/share/aEgCjckQ6zWaEVumzVcb5FMXoxRyUYny?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)
  - [Automatic disqualification for "maybe" or "no" candidates (under review)](https://fathom.video/share/aEgCjckQ6zWaEVumzVcb5FMXoxRyUYny?tab=summary&timestamp=1012.0)
  - [Slack integration for team notifications on new candidates](https://fathom.video/share/aEgCjckQ6zWaEVumzVcb5FMXoxRyUYny?tab=summary&timestamp=1094.0)

### Application Volume

  - [High volume for some roles (e.g., 700+ for content writer in 4 weeks)](https://fathom.video/share/aEgCjckQ6zWaEVumzVcb5FMXoxRyUYny?tab=summary&timestamp=1474.0)
  - [Engineering roles: \~10-15 quality applications per day after AI screening](https://fathom.video/share/aEgCjckQ6zWaEVumzVcb5FMXoxRyUYny?tab=summary&timestamp=1902.0)

### Potential Process Improvements

  - [Considering migration to Greenhouse ATS for better scaling and features](https://fathom.video/share/aEgCjckQ6zWaEVumzVcb5FMXoxRyUYny?tab=summary&timestamp=1690.0)
  - [Open to adjusting or removing current automation tools based on team needs](https://fathom.video/share/aEgCjckQ6zWaEVumzVcb5FMXoxRyUYny?tab=summary&timestamp=1940.0)
  - [Exploring possibilities for automated sourcing and custom integrations](https://fathom.video/share/aEgCjckQ6zWaEVumzVcb5FMXoxRyUYny?tab=summary&timestamp=1546.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Daniel to document the current hiring process in detail for Marília and Tucker](https://fathom.video/share/aEgCjckQ6zWaEVumzVcb5FMXoxRyUYny?tab=summary&timestamp=1843.0)
  - [Tucker to connect with Quantum Talent to streamline candidate sharing](https://fathom.video/share/aEgCjckQ6zWaEVumzVcb5FMXoxRyUYny?tab=summary&timestamp=1867.0)
  - [Team to evaluate current tools and processes, considering potential shifts (e.g., to Greenhouse ATS)](https://fathom.video/share/aEgCjckQ6zWaEVumzVcb5FMXoxRyUYny?tab=summary&timestamp=1690.0)
  - [Marília to review Workable and current processes hands-on](https://fathom.video/share/aEgCjckQ6zWaEVumzVcb5FMXoxRyUYny?tab=summary&timestamp=1120.0)
  - [Tucker to provide input on engineering hiring needs and process refinement](https://fathom.video/share/aEgCjckQ6zWaEVumzVcb5FMXoxRyUYny?tab=summary&timestamp=1956.0)
